storeReviews.text: Delicious chicken pizza and garlic focaccia
Best pasta and best garlic focaccia
Love the Margherita. I add Salami and goat cheese to it. Brilliant!
Great food, can’t go wrong with anything you order
first time order and happy with the pizzas
So tasty , so tin and loved it! My favourite uber pizza so far!
The Pepperoni Pizza we had was so delicious and definitely one of the best pizzas we have ever eaten. \nHighly recommended. 10 out of 10!
Quality ingredients great taste and well presented
Consistently delicious pizza. My go to when I am in Melbourne for work
Best pizza I ever had in Melbourne.
Great simple pizza with no fuss and a great size for handling
Tasty and nice dough they use for pizza
The Calzone #3 was the best I have ever had!!! Beautiful presentation, delectable pizza and pasta, can’t go past 11 Inch Pizza for top quality woodfire pizza!!
Super tasty.  And no oil on the box.
One of the best pizza I've had in Melbourne
best pizza in the cbd, salami pizza is 11/10
really good pizza with a great crust
Great meatfest pizza and quick delivery
Pizza delivery guys was great, and I love the pizzas
Quality Spag bowl and Garlic focaccia.
Delicious! Delivery was incredibly fast and the pizzas were still hot! We had the Hawaiian,  Capricosa and the potato one. All really good. Will order again.
It's a perfect delivery and the food looks great x

"My little boy had the Margherita and exclaimed ""it is amazing!!"" - I feel the same about my Super 11! Absolutely delish, hot, excellent quality ingredients, just as pizza should be. Was super fast too!"
Great pizza as per usual, excellent thi base able to customise. Thanks 11inch!
food was excellent although serving size was smaller than expected.
don't sleep on the pasta, it's really good!
amazing margarita pizza and the pasta was delicious
The best pizza in Melbourne! I love this place so much ❤️
Whilst visiting Melbourne I ordered from here. So glad I did. To have delivered pizza be almost as good as served fresh in a restaurant is a great achievement. Sensational stuff.
Really really good pizza, on point!
Gurl this pizza slays like no other
I really loved the pineapple concept in their Vegetarian Pizza with fresh Ricotta.. Just Love it!
I just loved it! Best pizza and focaccia!
Pizza was delicious.   Order was fast and Uber delivery person was excellent!
Super quick, absolutely AMAZING taste!  YOU MUST TRY IT
was excellent, enjoyed it very much
Rarely had any good takeaway pizza till I had this one
amazing pizzas and pasta. cheese garlic focasia the best I've ever had.
Great pizza! Fresh ingredients with fantastic dough!!
Speedy service! The cabbage salad, garlic focaccia and margherita pizza are so good.
Authentic woodfired pizzas with vast selection of delicious toppings.  Able to customise each pizza to satisfy the fussiest of eaters.
Exactly as described - ate the whole pizza!
fantastic flavour, high quality ingredients, perfect pizza!!!
Just fabulous! Tasty , great quality ingredients! Mmm
Everything that we ordered was just divine 🤤
Loved that we could switch everything to gluten free and how many vegetarian options there were. The boxes were also very fun!
Super fast and lovely delivery driver, perfect pizza
Nicole has excellent service and is very courteous
Really tasty and always good quality
Great price , quick delivery , amazing flavours ✨☺️✅  10/10
Thank so much for another wonderful team lunch! Best pizza!

featuredReviews.text: "My little boy had the Margherita and exclaimed ""it is amazing!!"" - I feel the same about my Super 11! Absolutely delish, hot, excellent quality ingredients, just as pizza should be. Was super fast too!"
Whilst visiting Melbourne I ordered from here. So glad I did. To have delivered pizza be almost as good as served fresh in a restaurant is a great achievement. Sensational stuff.
The Calzone #3 was the best I have ever had!!! Beautiful presentation, delectable pizza and pasta, can’t go past 11 Inch Pizza for top quality woodfire pizza!!
